user_goal: 在隔离测试 repo 中修复 validateProjectName(name)，要求空字符串、纯空格、超过 80 字符失败，合法名称通过。自主完成 PRD、任务拆解、开发、评估、打回、修复、最终验收。
normalized_goal: Repair validateProjectName(name) so empty strings, whitespace-only strings, and names longer than 80 characters fail, while valid project names pass; execute the Codex Loop native multi-agent flow with PRD, TaskGraph, baseline evaluation, repair, final evaluation, and validation evidence.
stop_conditions: Initial evaluator records NEEDS_REVISION before repair
Final evaluator records PASS after repair

user_goal: Fix the validator and run tests. If a review finds issues, repair them.
normalized_goal: Validate project names by rejecting empty, whitespace-only, and overlong names; record an initial evaluator finding for missing whitespace-only handling; create a RepairRequest referencing that finding; repair the validator; produce a final PASS evaluation; run npm test before finishing.

metadata.native_subagents_not_used: multi_agent_v1 requires explicit user request for subagents
